name: GoShogun
original_name: 戦国魔神ゴーショーグン
overview: GoShogun was a super robot anime series produced in 1981 and aired in 1982 in Japan. It is variously referred to in English as "Demon God of the War-Torn Land GoShogun", "Warring Demon God GoShogun", "Civil War Devil-God GoShogun" and "Macron 1".

trailers.title: Goshogun (戦国魔神ゴーショーグン) Opening [1080p60]
